market_sentiment.label: 中性
market_sentiment.summary: 資料更新中，請稍後再試

articles.title: Defense tech darling Mach Industries hits $1.8B valuation, a 4x jump in a year
articles.description: In a wild ride for 22-year-old founder and CEO Ethan Thornton, Mach Industries has raised another $300 million. It already has five autonomous vehicles in development and completed a major acquisition.

articles.title: Nvidia chases $200B CPU market with AI agent PCs from Microsoft, Dell, and HP
articles.description: If Nvidia has cracked a way to bring AI agents easily, safely and usefully to the masses, it could — and should — be big.

articles.title: Crypto investment firm Keyrock is acquiring bankrupt lender Blockfills
articles.description: The Brussels-based digital asset services firm plans to purchase BlockFills months after the Chicago-based company filed for Chapter 11 bankruptcy, if a court approves.

articles.title: Bitcoin volatility is down 56% but analysts still expect up to 20% BTC price move
articles.description: Bitcoin’s sharp volatility decline coincides with a 114-day trading range, setting the stage for a potential 10% to 20% price move, but the direction remains uncertain.

articles.title: From the stage to the future: Where are Startup Battlefield’s alumni now?
articles.description: We wanted to show you what happens after the confetti falls. We checked in with some of our recent alumni, many of whom have sat down with us on Build Mode: The Founder Survival Guide, TechCrunch's podcast for founders at every stage.

articles.title: Florida sues OpenAI, Sam Altman, in first-of-its-kind lawsuit over violent incidents
articles.description: The lawsuit partially revolves around a shooting at Florida State University last year, and ChatGPT's alleged role in the incident.

articles.title: Hackers hijacked Instagram accounts by tricking Meta AI support chatbot into granting access
articles.description: Several users on social media reported having their Instagram accounts hacked over the weekend. Meta's own support chatbot was blamed for allowing hackers to hijack accounts.

articles.title: Japan’s ruling party pushes crypto ETFs, yen-denominated stablecoins
articles.description: The Parliamentary Association for the Promotion of Blockchain delivered recommendations to Japan’s finance minister on crypto and blockchain.

articles.title: Strategy's BTC sale turns Bitcoin treasury into market stress test
articles.description: Strategy’s 32 BTC transaction has sparked debate over how investors value Bitcoin treasury companies as capital structure and liquidity considerations evolve.

articles.title: Water access is now a risk factor in SpaceX’s IPO
articles.description: The company says it needs "significant" water resources to cool its data centers, and that access to abundant, affordable water is a challenge.

articles.title: Crypto funds suffer second-largest outflows of 2026 while XRP and HYPE attract inflows
articles.description: Investors pulled $1.67 billion from digital asset investment products last week, with bitcoin funds posting their largest weekly outflow of the year, according to a recent report from CoinShares.

articles.title: A new app, The Mall, is building a universal feed for online shopping
articles.description: The Mall lets shoppers build a personalized feed of brands, track sales and drops, and discover products across thousands of retailers.

articles.title: Saylor's Strategy sold bitcoin for the first time since 2022. These firms are still buying
articles.description: With Strategy breaking its accumulation streak and many peers stepping aside, the list of active digital asset treasuries has narrowed considerably.

articles.title: It's not 2022 anymore: What Strategy's first bitcoin sale can (and can't) tell us about this one
articles.description: Michael Saylor's Strategy has evolved into a far more complex bitcoin-finance machine since it last sold BTC three and half years ago.

articles.title: Ethereum's Vitalik Buterin is rethinking how DeFi handles market crashes
articles.description: In a research post published Monday, Buterin proposed creating index-tracking assets using options contracts rather than the debt-based structures that underpin much of DeFi today.

articles.title: Zigging when most are zagging, ex-Meta CTO raises $250M climate fund
articles.description: Mike Schroepfer's Gigascale Capital has raised a large fund to back founders building climate-friendly solutions for the world's energy and material shortages.

articles.title: Anthropic files to go public
articles.description: Anthropic, now an AI powerhouse that has landed top-tier enterprise customers, was once considered an underdog in the emerging world of large language models.

articles.title: Michael Saylor breaks silence after Strategy sells $2.5 million in bitcoin
articles.description: Michael Saylor says Strategy aims to make STRC the world's best credit instrument after the company sold bitcoin to help fund preferred stock distributions

articles.title: This AI weather startup is out-forecasting government agencies
articles.description: WindBorne benefits from its unique combination of model-building and data collection. The company now has about 400 balloons in flight gathering sensor readings at any given time, launched from 15 sites around the globe. articles.title: Strategy sparks panic with bitcoin sale, but analysts say it was 'immaterial'
articles.description: The move suggests a greater willingness on the part of Michael Saylor and Strategy to use BTC holdings to support the capital structure, said one analyst, while others disagreed.
